description_long: This is a cylindrical white ceramic cup with a smoothly curved handle attached to one side. The cup features a bold, black graphic design or partial text on its exterior surface, which wraps around a portion of the cup. The rim is wide and even, and the body tapers slightly towards the base, giving it a classic mug shape. The handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping and is seamlessly integrated into the cup's body. The interior appears to be plain and unadorned, matching the exterior's white color.
description: A white ceramic cup with a black graphic design and a smoothly curved handle, featuring a classic mug shape.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with its handle on the right and a partial black graphic visible on the left side.
description_view_1: The handle is centered and fully visible, with the rest of the cup's surface plain and white.
description_view_2: The handle is on the left, and a larger portion of the black graphic is visible on the right side of the cup.
description_view_3: The cup is shown from the side opposite the handle, with the black graphic design most prominent and wrapping around the surface.
